campaign: Pet Tooth Fairy - Mobile Dental - Clermont FL - Search (PMax paused 06-20)
actions_taken: 2026-06-22 · capped CPC: switched bidding MAXIMIZE_CONVERSIONS -> MAXIMIZE_CLICKS with $5.00 cpc_bid_ceiling (via gads-cli campaign bidding, dry-run+gated apply). Stops the $15-18 overbid; gathers cheap clicks while SITE PR #1 fixes the funnel. Phase 2: back to Maximize Conversions/tCPA after ~30 real bookings.

2026-06-26 · PHRASE expansion (gated, owner-approved): campaign expand added 2 ad groups (Dog Dental — Phrase 10 kw + Cat Dental — Phrase 4 kw + 1 RSA each) to widen reach beyond the EXACT-dominated set. 18 ops, verified ENABLED (campaign now 6 ad groups); new RSAs in review. Spend-neutral (shared $30 budget unchanged). See proposals/ads-20260626-phrase-expand.md.
open_issues: RESOLVED 06-23 — cap working: 1st post-cap clicks came in at ~$1.78 CPC (crashed from ~$16). Campaign SERVING. Yesterday's near-zero delivery was the LEARNING reset + the PC sleeping overnight, NOT the $5 cap. Keep $5; only revisit if volume stays too thin to gather data.

CORRECTION 06-26: paid HAS converted (earlier 'zero paid conv' was wrong — I read the site's organic-booking view, not the Google Ads conversion metric). Campaign conversions last 7d = 2 Booking Confirmed + 2 Booking Form Submit (06-23/06-24). PHRASE expansion WORKED: 06-26 today 81 impr / 11 clicks / $52.34, with 8 of 11 clicks from the new 'Dog Dental — Phrase' group (ads cleared review). CPC rose to ~$4.78 (PHRASE more competitive than the $1.78 EXACT) but under the $5 cap. Spend $52 today = Google over-delivery over the $30 budget (within the $100/day client ceiling). Next: confirm PHRASE traffic converts; mine new search terms in a few days + add negatives.

DONE 06-23 — 24/7 cloud watchdog LIVE (.github/workflows/heartbeat.yml). BUT BROKEN 06-26: the OAuth refresh token expired (app in Testing mode -> 7-day expiry; test user is NOT petoothfairy@gmail.com -> access_denied). Local .env re-authed + fixed (auth now auto-saves to .env). PENDING owner: (1) run scripts/set-github-secrets.ps1 to refresh GOOGLE_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN secret -> unbreaks the cloud watchdog + conversion sync; (2) GCP -> Publish the OAuth app to kill the 7-day expiry permanently.
